# BRD Alignment Summary

The supplied BRD/BFD supports the institutional risk architecture but not the specific loan underwriting thresholds. This package therefore uses BRD for risk and governance and Addenda A-C for loan-origination benchmark thresholds.

## BRD-supported items

- VaR and Expected Shortfall framework
- Risk Core before agent reasoning
- 10-day horizon through the risk packet methodology
- 95% confidence in the risk methodology/configuration
- Audit controls
- No-trade / analysis-only governance

## Addendum-supported items

- FICO >= 700 from Addendum A
- DTI <= 0.36 from Addendum B
- LTV <= 0.80 from Addendum C
- VaR <= 0.12 from Addendum C Risk Appetite Note
